EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IVertexAttribute

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Identifies geometries that can have attributes on their vertices.

[Guid("AB2A8C25-D660-11D2-9F2A-00C04F6BDF0D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVertexAttribute

Properties

VertexAttributeMax[esriGeometryAttributes]

The maximum vertex attribute value of this type for all vertices in this object.

double VertexAttributeMax[esriGeometryAttributes attributeType] { get; }

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

VertexAttributeMin[esriGeometryAttributes]

The minimum vertex attribute value of this type for all vertices in this object.

double VertexAttributeMin[esriGeometryAttributes attributeType] { get; }

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

VertexAttributeSimple[esriGeometryAttributes]

Indicates if there are no 'empty' vertex attribute values of this type for this object.

bool VertexAttributeSimple[esriGeometryAttributes attributeType] { get; }

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

CalculateNonSimpleVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes)

Extrapolates/interpolates the non-simple vertex attribute values.

void CalculateNonSimpleVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExtrapolateVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes, esriExtrapolationEnum, int, int, int, int)

Extrapolates the attribute values at the begining of the geometry up to the fromIndex based on the attribute value interval between the fromIndex and the toIndex.

void ExtrapolateVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, esriExtrapolationEnum extrapolationStyle, int startPart, int startPoint, int endPart, int endPoint)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
startPart int
startPoint int
endPart int
endPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

InterpolateVertexAttributesBetween(int, int, int, int, int)

Generate vertex attribute values by linear interpolation for all vertices in the range [start+1, end-1]. (Sets point IDs to 0 rather than interpolating).

void InterpolateVertexAttributesBetween(int interpolatedAttributes, int startPart, int startPoint, int endPart, int endPoint)

Parameters

interpolatedAttributes int
startPart int
startPoint int
endPart int
endPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MultiplyVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes, double)

Scale all vertex attribute values of this type by the specified factor.

void MultiplyVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, double factor)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
factor double

Examples

Sample Snippet

OffsetVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes, double)

Offset all vertex attribute values of this type by the specified factor.

void OffsetVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, double Offset)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
Offset double
